@if (registerForm.get('username')?.errors?.['required']) { Username is required. } @if (registerForm.get('username')?.errors?.['minlength']) { At least 3 characters. } @if (registerForm.get('username')?.errors?.['maxlength']) { Maximum 20 characters. } @if (registerForm.get('username')?.errors?.['pattern']) { Only letters, numbers, dots, and hyphens allowed. }
}
@if (registerForm.get('password')?.touched && registerForm.get('password')?.invalid) {
@if (registerForm.get('password')?.errors?.['required']) { Password is required. } @if (registerForm.get('password')?.errors?.['minlength']) { At least 6 characters. }
}
@if (registerForm.get('repeatPassword')?.touched && registerForm.get('repeatPassword')?.invalid) {
@if (registerForm.get('repeatPassword')?.errors?.['required']) { Confirmation is required. } @if (registerForm.get('repeatPassword')?.errors?.['passwordMismatch']) { Passwords must match. }
}

{{ errorMessage() }}
}

}

{{ report.reason }}

source:
✨ The new standard for publishing

Ideas that
shape the future.

Discover stories, thinking, and expertise from writers on any topic. Step into a curated world where good ideas find you.

+

Join 50,000+ writers & thinkers.

★★★★★
Draft - The Future of AI

The inevitable shift.

As we move towards a more connected world, the intersection of human creativity and machine logic becomes...

📈
+12.5k Readers this week
✨
Top Writer Technology
{{ topic }} ✦

A platform built for depth.

Everything you need to read, write, and grow your audience seamlessly.

📖

Uncompromising Reading Experience

No pop-ups. No distractions. Just pure typography and content in a beautiful, minimalist environment designed specifically for deep focus.

💡

Express Effortlessly

A world-class WYSIWYG editor that gets out of your way so your ideas can flow.

🚀

Built-in Distribution

Your stories are algorithmically matched with readers who actually care about your niche.

Claim your voice.

Start your free publication today. Set up takes less than 2 minutes.

No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
